variant_ornament_1.concept: A rigid, symmetrical hexagonal maze structure that is strictly bisected. The left side represents cold order, while the right side fractures into scattered geometric shards.
variant_ornament_1.prompt: A small, centered, minimalist abstract geometric ornament for a book chapter header on a stark white background. The design features a rigid, symmetrical hexagonal maze on the left side that abruptly fractures into scattered, jagged geometric shards on the right side. Pure black-and-white vector illustration, flat high contrast, no shading, clean and clinical layout, under 2 inches wide. White background. No text.

variant_ornament_2.concept: A stylized, surreal technological halo floating above a different decaying cybernetic organ for each chapter, representing the merger of the divine, the mechanical, and the mortal.
variant_ornament_2.prompt: A small, centered figurative chapter header ornament on a stark white background. The image shows a stylized, glowing neon-cyan technological halo hovering ominously over a decaying cybernetic human heart. Detailed realistic rendering, cinematic sci-fi lighting, vibrant neon accents contrasting with rotting biological textures and dark metallic implants. Small decorative motif, under 2 inches wide. White background. No text.

variant_ornament_3.concept: A single, continuous, delicate fine line drawing that starts as a taut, straight wire and violently snaps into a messy, looping tangle representing a specific fractured bone.
variant_ornament_3.prompt: A small, centered minimalist line art ornament for a chapter header on a stark white background. A single, delicate, continuous black line forms a taut, straight wire that suddenly snaps, fraying into a chaotic, jagged tangle of loops. Pure black-and-white, austere, sketchy fine line drawing, empty space, minimalistic, under 2 inches wide. White background. No text.

variant_ornament_4.concept: A clinical, highly ornamental vignette combining a metallic syringe tip interwoven with decaying baroque anatomical flora.
variant_ornament_4.medium: Traditional woodcut printmaking with heavy stippling.
variant_ornament_4.prompt: A small, centered detailed engraving style ornament for a chapter header on a stark white background. The design features a highly detailed metallic syringe tip interwoven with decaying baroque anatomical flora, like fleshy petals and exposed mechanical veins. Rendered entirely in heavy black-and-white stippling and cross-hatching, mimicking a gritty antique woodcut print. Under 2 inches wide. White background. No text.
